HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

Data3D Struct Reference

Structure representing the 3D spatial data used for tabulation in a layered medium. More...

Detailed Description

Structure representing the 3D spatial data used for tabulation in a layered medium.
